mapper.insert: INSERT INTO NOTIFICATION (MEMBER_ID, NOTI_TYPE, MESSAGE) VALUES (#{memberId}, #{notiType}, #{message})
mapper.select: SELECT n.NOTI_ID as "notiId", n.MEMBER_ID as "memberId", n.NOTI_TYPE as "notiType", n.MESSAGE as "message", n.IS_READ as "isRead", n.CREATED_AT as "createdAt", m.NAME as "name" FROM NOTIFICATION n JOIN MEMBER m ON n.MEMBER_ID = m.MEMBER_ID WHERE n.MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} ORDER BY n.CREATED_AT DESC
